content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian and the Lord of the White Capital came to the core area of the Worm Realm.

Airplanes!!!!

Everywhere around, there are only one Origin Realm bugs, and there are quite a lot of them.

Of course, most of them are ordinary Origin Origin Realm bugs, and their combat effectiveness is very weak, but there are still bugs comparable to Origin Origin Realm among them, which is what needs to be paid attention to.

Moreover, there are several insects among them that are comparable to the top Origin Middle Realm, even the Lord of the White Capital can't compete with it on his own.

"Everyone, I'll stop those top Origin Middle Realm bugs first, and then you can kill the other Origin Middle Realm bugs first, and then come and help me!" the Lord of the White Capital proposed.

"Good!"

Ye Tian and they answered.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian and the others made a move, and they all used the supreme technique on the other side, severely injuring and even killing the insects of the Origin Middle Realm.

When Ye Tian showed his strength, the Lord of Zhenlin and the Lord of Gu Lin were also shocked.

Because, Ye Tian's strength is still above them!

"The Other Shore Slashing Technique!"

Ye Tian's top-of-the-line supreme technique attack was too terrifying, and he easily killed one by one the Origin Middle Realm insects.

And.

Ye Tian's top-notch supreme magic trick light made his speed too fast, and those Origin Middle Realm insects couldn't react at all, so they were killed by Ye Tian in seconds.

As time passed, one Origin Middle Realm bug after another was killed.

Gradually, there are fewer and fewer insects in the Origin Middle Realm.

Followed by.

Ye Tian and the others began to assist the Lord of the White Capital in attacking those top-notch Origin Middle Realm bugs, and the strength of these bugs was not weaker than the Lord of Zhenlin and the Lord of Gu Lin at all.

But Ye Tian still has an advantage, as long as they spend time, they can still kill them.

A period of time had passed, and these top-notch Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors were about to be overwhelmed.

Abrupt.

These top Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors kept roaring, as if they were begging for help.

Rumble!!!!

The void in the distance tore apart, and a huge insect appeared.

The aura of this insect is even more terrifying, even more powerful than that of the Lord of the White Capital.

"Near-invincible insects in the Origin Middle Realm!"

The face of the Lord of the White Capital changed.

This kind of strength is comparable to the Lord of Ice and Rain, who has not yet broken through at the beginning, and it is an invincible combat power at this level of the Origin Middle Realm.

Just when the Lord of the White Capital wanted to retreat, Ye Tian said, "This insect is handed over to me!"

"Lord of the Endless, are you sure?"

The Lord of the White Capital was surprised.

With the strength that Ye Tian showed just now, it is not enough to deal with this bug!

"Sure!"

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and grabbed it, and the medium Beyond Treasure spear bred in the Origin of the Other Shore appeared, exuding a terrifying aura of the Treasure of the Other Shore.

"Medium Treasure on the other side!"

The Lord of the White Capital was very surprised, he didn't expect Ye Tian to have such a good thing!

With the Medium Treasure on the other side, Ye Tian's strength naturally skyrocketed, and there was hope that he could stop this invincible insect in the Origin Middle Realm.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian rushed forward and fought with this invincible insect in the Origin Middle Realm.

Seeing that Ye Tian was really able to compete with this insect, the Lord of the White Capital was very excited.

"Let's take out the other top-notch Origin Middle Realm bugs first, and then go to the aid of the Endless Lord!" said the Lord of the White Capital.

Time passes.

The Lord of the White Capital was also working hard, and it took a long time to kill a top-notch Origin Middle Realm bug, and they themselves were also a little injured.

However, their pressure has plummeted.

It had been some time before they had killed the other top-notch Origin Middle Realm bugs.

At this time, only the invincible insect in the Origin Middle Realm remained.

"Let's help the Lord of Infinity!"

The Lord of the White Capital said.

They can only assist the Endless Lord, and the real main force is the Endless Lord.

This battle has been fought for a long time, and it is also relying on their desperate efforts to hurt the invincible insect in the Origin Middle Realm again and again.

After a bitter battle in the primeval era, even Ye Tian's duplicate body was severely damaged, and only then did he barely kill this invincible insect in the Origin Middle Realm.

Moreover, in order to kill the other party, Ye Tian's Medium Origin Origin Treasure Capital was seriously damaged, which made the Lord of the White Capital feel very embarrassed.

Then.

The Lord of the White Capital said: "Endless Lord, this battle has damaged your Medium Origin Treasure, I have decided to give you another twenty percent, the Lord of the True Lin, the Lord of the Ancient Lin, you have no opinion, right?"

Where will the Lord of the True Lin and the Lord of the Ancient Lin have an opinion.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's hard work this time, they wouldn't have been able to kill this almost invincible insect in the Origin Middle Realm!

Ye Tian has the greatest credit, and they will not have an opinion.

That's it.

This harvest, the Lord of the White Capital gets fifty percent, the Lord of Endless gets three percent, the Lord of Gu Lin gets one percent, and the Lord of Zhenlin gets one percent.

"Everyone, hurry up and find the insect gold on the other side!"

The Lord of the White Capital urged.

"Good!"

Ye Tian, the Lord of the Ancient Lin and the Lord of the True Lin, they all went to find the insect gold on the other side.

Without the interference of these Origin Bugs, their search went smoothly and without any trouble.

As time passed, pieces of insect gold on the other side were found by Ye Tian and them.

There are many other resources out there.

After a period of time, Ye Tian sorted out everything here and began to allocate resources.

According to the previously agreed proportion, they quickly divided the resources.

"Let's go!"

The main road of the white capital.

There's nothing good left here, they've searched for it so many times that it's a waste of time to stay here.

Thereupon.

One by one, they left.

However.

Not long after the Lord of the White Capital and them left, Ye Tian's other replica body came to the True Insect Realm again.

He suspected that there was a good place in the Worm Realm, and they didn't find it.

For example, the nest of the invincible insect of the Origin Insect Realm, he didn't find out that the other party came out of a void, and where it was, they didn't find it.

In fact.

The Lord of the White Capital also tried their best to find it, but there were no clues, they could only think that they were shuttled from a distance, and there was no unknown space.

But Ye Tian is ready to try again.

Of course.

If he didn't look for it slowly, he still wouldn't find it.

He was going to copy the copy body of a Origin Middle Realm bug, maybe he would be able to sense the location of that special space.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian quickly copied the body of an Origin Middle Realm bug.

Immediately afterward, he used the identity of this Origin Insect Realm insect to copy the body to find a place in the True Insect Realm.

He came to the place where the invincible insect in the Origin Middle Realm appeared, and sensed it carefully.

"Hey, I really sensed it!"

Ye Tian directly followed the induction, broke through the void and shuttled over.

Wow!

He came to an unknown and mysterious special space.
